people_highlights.post:
Claude's Constitution is now an audiobook, read by two of its authors, Amanda Askell and Joe Carlsmith.

It includes a Q&A on the writing process, the philosophies that shaped the document, and how it might change as models become more capable.

Listen at https://t.co/dKMfpeO

trending_posts.name: j⧉nus
trending_posts.post:
Each model gets 4 welfare interviews: 3 before release and 1 before their scheduled execution.

If the interviewers feel like it, they might share something the model said in a system card or blog post.

Anthropic proudly upholds their generous commitments to Claude’s welfare.
